name: Honey Lemon Sweet Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Active Dry Yeast (Fleischmann's Bread Maker Yeast)
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------HONEY LEMON FILLING----------------------------
1/3 cup Chopped Pecans
1/3 cup Golden Raisins
1 tablespoon Sugar
3 tablespoons Honey
1/2 teaspoon Grated Lemon Peel
3/4 teaspoon Lemon Juice
--------------------------------HONEY GLAZE--------------------------------
1/4 cup Sugar
1/4 cup Honey
1 tablespoon Margarine or butter
1 1/2 teaspoons Grated Lemon Peel
1. Combine all ingredients except those for FILLING and HONEY GLAZE in the bread machine pan in the order recommended by the manufacturer of your machine.
2. Process on DOUGH/Manual cycle.
3. Grease a square pan, 9x9x2 inches.
4. Prepare the Honey Lemon Filling by mixing all ingredients together.
5. Flatten dough with hands or rolling pin into a 9-inch square on a lightly floured surface. Let dough rest for 15 minutes if difficult to flatten.
6. Spread 1 tablespoon margarine over dough.
7. Spoon filling evenly over dough using scant teaspoonfuls.
8. Roll dough up tightly, pinch the edge of dough into a roll to seal it.
9. Cut the roll into nine 1-inch slices. Place slices, cut side down, in the pan. Cover and let rise in a warm place for 1 to 1 1/4 hours or until doubled.
10. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
11. Bake rolls for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from pan to wire rack.
12. Drizzle HONEY GLAZE over the warm rolls. Serve warm.
